benefits.description: Complete distal bicep tendon rupture recovered post-surgical repair. Arm regained full strength and symmetrical size by 8 months post-surgery while on retatrutide throughout entire recovery period.

side_effects.description: Injured left arm tires sooner in gym compared to right arm

protocol_notes: Surgery date end of May 2025. Physical therapy started 2 weeks post-surgery for 12 weeks. Currently 8 months post-surgery (approximately February 2026). Retatrutide used throughout entire recovery period. Anecdotal report suggesting retatrutide does not impair soft tissue injury recovery.
